texto: May the words come easy, the doubt be weak, and the coffee strong enough to eat through steel. (I don't drink coffee...but I understand most authors do, and they like it with a bit of fight in it.) Now, let us boot up, sit down, and accrue those daily page counts!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a G. Allen Cook: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “May the words come easy, the doubt be weak, and the coffee strong enough to eat through steel. (I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, humor, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e inspiracional.
